author: Vincent Voyer
subject: perf(filesize): use preact in production build (#1224)
body:
* perf(filesize): use preact in production build

fixes #1030

instantsearch.min.js **React build** => 113kb (gzipped)
instantsearch.min.js **preact build** => 77kb (gzipped)

* fix(Selector): switch to controlled component

This was working with React, not preact. But ultimately this was not
the right way to select the value.

* test(preact): change the way we fill priceRange form
